judge_thought:
Explanation:
The phrase “teammates and opponents simultaneously” implies two competitors who are on the same team (teammates) but racing against each other (opponents). Therefore, we identify teams with multiple drivers in this race. From the table, the teams with at least two drivers are:
- Chip Ganassi Racing (Scott Dixon, Dario Franchitti)
- Penske Racing (Ryan Briscoe, Hélio Castroneves)
- Andretti Green Racing (Hideki Mutoh, Marco Andretti, Tony Kanaan, Danica Patrick)
- Newman/Haas/Lanigan Racing (Graham Rahal, Oriol Servià)
- HVM Racing (Robert Doornbos, E. J. Viso)
- Dreyer & Reinbold Racing (Mike Conway, Milka Duno)

These match the Prediction Answer exactly.
